message:
Enhance fleet management and telemetry collection

Fleet operations:
- fleet/mod.rs: Improve fleet orchestration
- fleet/preflight.rs: Better preflight checks with validation
- fleet/rollback.rs: Remove unused import

Telemetry:
- collect/mod.rs: Improve metric collection
- rchd/telemetry.rs: Better telemetry aggregation

Transfer improvements:
- transfer.rs: Additional transfer reliability enhancements

Common patterns:
- patterns.rs: Pattern matching adjustments

Daemon:
- api.rs: Minor API adjustment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
